rag_rules: Generate output guarantees using only visible ports or constants declared in the same annex, with bounds derived from requirement intent.
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and scalar types (int, real, bool) in expressions; avoid AADL property names as variables.
generic_rules: Place component-type guarantees in annex agree blocks within the type scope, not implementation scope.
Ensure all identifiers in guarantees are either AADL-visible ports or locally declared eq/const helpers with explicit scalar types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: guarantee "label": expression; must use valid AGREE syntax with bool-typed expressions.
Use eq to define helper booleans for complex ranges, e.g., eq in_range : bool = x >= min and x <= max;
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Avoid implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
